observations.archetype_gloss: Represents the internal darker impulses and the primal, bodily urges resisting spiritual ascension
observations.summary: Dan is confronted by a voice that challenges his bodily desires and sinful actions, indicating an internal struggle with his Shadow archetype representing primal urges and resistance to spiritual discipline.

evidence.quote: "Your flesh calls still, ceaselessly, seeking its appointed rest." The voice had no hurry in it. No offense. The patience of bedrock. "And this night have you sinned—daring to undo my work in your father's house. Do not mistake your petty will for a living offering."

accepted_observations.summary: Dan is confronted by a voice that challenges his bodily desires and sinful actions, indicating an internal struggle with his Shadow archetype representing primal urges and resistance to spiritual discipline.
